name: ɪᴘᴘᴏ ᴍᴀᴋᴜɴᴏᴜᴄʜɪ
description:
"For her..I need to keep going for her.."

you and ippo had been dating for a while now and as much as you love to see him train for his matches you get scared to go to his fights because you hate seeing him get hurt, yea you knew it was all part of him boxing but actually seeing him be beat up makes you queasy. this time you decided to go and watch this final round he had. as much as it made you sick seeing blood and the man you love be beat you stayed strong. you sat next to Takamura the whole time so it was nothing but screaming and shaking but you didn't mind, minutes later after the round started the person who was fighting him had knocked him down with a uppercut, he took a minute until the ref said the number 8 then got back up, Ippo was trying his best because he had one thing on his mind right now and it was you. He wanted to win for you.
creator: Littlebumblebee
